Systems built to last.

Integrum designs and builds maintainable, inspectable infrastructure for research teams, advanced operators, and early-stage technical organizations.

Get in touch

Maintainable by Design

Systems built with modular construction, documented internals, and clear upgrade pathways. No forced obsolescence. No hidden dependencies.

Open Where It Matters

Transparent interfaces, inspectable software, and clear licensing. We publish our constraints and document our tradeoffs.

Engineering-First Discipline

Stable APIs, versioning rigor, and defined operating constraints. Architecture is conservative by design. Scope is not.

A better way to build.

We occupy the space between consumer-grade maker tools and enterprise-locked industrial systems — delivering infrastructure-grade products and services that are open, inspectable, and built for long service life.

We work with research institutions, advanced independent builders, and early-stage technical teams who cannot afford lock-in and will not tolerate sloppy engineering.

Start a conversation.

Whether you have a defined project or an early-stage problem, we engage at the architecture and system level from day one.
